zh.lifeSummary: Alice De Curci於1157年出生在英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓。她於1188年與Henry de Cornhill, Sheriff of London結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1225年在美國密西根州門羅倫敦 堂史普倫敦享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Curci
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Silvio, Caterina, Cosmo, Domenic, Franco.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Curcio  .

variants.name: Curcio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Carmine, Sal, Mario, Milio, Salvatore, Silverio, Benito, Domenic, Francesco, Franco, Gandolfo, Orlando, Rocco, Rosario, Aniello, Adriana, Albino, Alfonso, Armando, Basilio, Emilio, Ermando.
Italian (southern): nickname from southern dialect curciu ‘short, small in stature’ (from Latin curtus ‘short’).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice De Curci was born in 1157, in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. She married Henry de Cornhill, Sheriff of London in 1188. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1225, in London, London Township, Monroe, Michigan, United States, at the age of 68.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice De Curciは1157年にイギリスイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた。1188年にHenry de Cornhill, Sheriff of Londonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1225年にアメリカ合衆国ミシガン州モンローロンドン トウンシュイップロンドンで68歳で死去した。

ko.London, London, England: 미국 미시간 주 먼로 런던 타운시프 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Alice De Curci(은)는 1157년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1188년 Henry de Cornhill, Sheriff of London(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 미국 미시간 주 먼로 런던 타운시프 런던에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1225 г. в местности лондон, лондон тоуншип, монро, Мичиган, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 68 лет.
